prompt_preview:
Rank all active defender candidates and choose one final strategy. Prompt mode: compact.
Allowed defender IDs only: ["D4_isolate_edge2_vm_s4", "D0_observe"]

Return exactly one compact JSON object with keys:
- selected_defender_strategy_id
raw_text:
{
  "selected_defender_strategy_id": "D0_observe",

    },

    }
